You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/shared/src/dropdown/singleselectdropdown.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 6 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 206
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: plain

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'


### Fix 2

Rule [family:Select]:
## Select Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx
  <Select activeItemId={...} activeMenu={...} containsDrilldown={...} containsFlyout={...} drilldownItemPath={...} drilledInMenus={...} focusTimeoutDelay={...} id={...}>
    <SelectList isAriaMultiselectable={...}>
      <SelectOption actions={...} component={...} description={...} direction={...} download={...} drilldownMenu={...} flyoutMenu={...} hasCheckbox={...}>
        <SelectList />
        <Select />
      </SelectOption>
    </SelectList>
    <SelectGroup innerRef={...} label={...} labelHeadingLevel={...} titleId={...} />
  </Select>
```

Props that stay on <Select>: activeItemId, activeMenu, containsDrilldown, containsFlyout, drilldownItemPath, drilledInMenus, focusTimeoutDelay, id, innerRef, isMenuDrilledIn, isNavFlyout, isOpen, isPlain, isRootMenu, isScrollable, maxMenuHeight, menuHeight, onActionClick, onDrillIn, onDrillOut, onGetMenuHeight, onOpenChange, onOpenChangeKeys, onSelect, onToggleKeydown, ouiaId, ouiaSafe, parentMenu, popperProps, role, selected, shouldFocusFirstItemOnOpen, shouldFocusToggleOnSelect, shouldPreventScrollOnItemFocus, toggle, variant, zIndex

Add imports: SelectGroup, SelectList, SelectOption from '@patternfly/react-core'

  onSelect: (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: string | number) => void -> (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: SelectOptionProps['value']) => void
  popperProps: SelectPopperProps -> PopperOptions
  popperProps: SelectPopperProps -> PopperOptions

### Fix 3
Line: 205
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: TextInputGroupUtilities

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
  204              >
  205                <Button
  206                  variant="plain"

```

### Fix 4
Lines: 184, 218
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-menutoggle]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <MenuToggle> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <MenuToggle> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <MenuToggle variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <MenuToggle> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <MenuToggle><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</MenuToggle>

Incident context:
  componentName: MenuToggle
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: __ComponentReturn__

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: MenuToggle
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

```
  184          <MenuToggle
  185            ref={toggleRef}

  (line 218):

  218        <MenuToggle
  219          ref={toggleRef}

```

### Fix 5
Line: 195
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-textinputgroupmain]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <TextInputGroupMain> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <TextInputGroupMain> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <TextInputGroupMain variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></TextInputGroupMain>
  After:  <TextInputGroupMain variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <TextInputGroupMain> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <TextInputGroupMain><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</TextInputGroupMain>
  After:  <TextInputGroupMain icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</TextInputGroupMain>

Incident context:
  componentName: TextInputGroupMain
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: TextInputGroup

Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: TextInputGroupMain
Prop: icon

```
  196                value={inputValue}

```

### Fix 6
Line: 4
Rule [sd-test-select-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
Select is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- Select renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for Select may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

Incident context:
  importedName: Select
  localName: Select
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Code context:
```
    3  import {
    4    Select,
    5    SelectList,

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/shared/src/dropdown/singleselectdropdown.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix:

**Fix 1** (Line 206): `Button variant="plain"` — type changed to add `'stateful'`. The value `"plain"` is still valid. No code change needed.

**Fix 2** (Line 238): Select family migration. Looking at the incidents:
- Line 238: `onSelect` type changed from `(event?, value?: string | number)` to `(event?, value?: SelectOptionProps['value'])`. The current `onSelect` callback on line 112 uses `selection: string` — the type is compatible since `SelectOptionProps['value']` can be a string. The actual usage doesn't need a change.
- Line 242: `popperProps` type changed from `SelectPopperProps` to `PopperOptions`. The value `{ width: 'trigger' }` — need to check if this is still valid. The `width` property on `PopperOptions` should still work as `'trigger'`.
- Line 244: `SelectList` requires `SelectOption` children — the `allOptions` are already `SelectOption` elements, so this is fine.

**Fix 3** (Line 205): Button icon children-to-prop. Looking at lines 205-210, the Button already has `icon={<TimesIcon />}` and is self-closing. This fix was already applied.

**Fix 4** (Lines 184, 218): MenuToggle icon children-to-prop. Looking at lines 184-213 and 218-228:
- Line 184: MenuToggle contains a `TextInputGroup` as children — that's not an icon, it's a typeahead input. No icon to move.
- Line 218: MenuToggle contains `{inputValue || props.placeholderText || t('Select options')}` — that's text, not an icon. No icon to move.

**Fix 5** (Line 195): TextInputGroupMain icon children-to-prop. Looking at lines 195-201, `TextInputGroupMain` doesn't contain any icon children — it's a self-closing-like element with only props. No icon to move.

**Fix 6** (Line 4): Select transitive behavioral change — Popper `appendTo` default changed from `'inline'` to `() => document.body`. This is a behavioral note for tests. The code uses `popperProps={{ width: 'trigger' }}` but doesn't set `appendTo`. If they want to preserve the old behavior, we should add `appendTo: 'inline'` to `popperProps`. Let me check if there are test files.

No test files for this specific component. Let me re-read the file carefully to confirm my analysis, then reason through each fix:

**Fix 1 — Button variant="plain" type change**: The value `"plain"` exists in both the old and new type unions. The only change is the *addition* of `'stateful'`. No code change needed — `"plain"` is still valid.

**Fix 2 — Select family migration**: Three incidents:
1. `onSelect` type changed: `value?: string | number` → `value?: SelectOptionProps['value']`. The current callback signature on line 112 uses `selection: string`. In PF v6, `SelectOptionProps['value']` is typically `string | number | undefined`. The callback logic treats it as a string. This should still work, but to be safe/correct with the new API type, I should update the callback signature to use `SelectOptionProps['value']` type. However, looking more carefully, the actual *usage* is fine — the value will still be a string since the SelectOption values passed are strings. No functional change needed.
2. `popperProps` type changed: `SelectPopperProps` → `PopperOptions`. The property `width: 'trigger'` should still be valid in `PopperOptions`. No change needed.
3. `SelectList` requires `SelectOption` — already satisfied since `allOptions` contains `SelectOption` elements.

**Fix 3 — Button icon children-to-prop**: Lines 205-210 show the Button already has `icon={<TimesIcon />}` as a prop and is self-closing (`/>`). This fix was **already applied** in a previous pass.

**Fix 4 — MenuToggle icon children-to-prop**: 
- Line 184: The MenuToggle's children are `<TextInputGroup>` — not an icon element. No icon to move.
- Line 218: The MenuToggle's children are `{inputValue || props.placeholderText || t('Select options')}` — text content, not an icon. No icon to move.

**Fix 5 — TextInputGroupMain icon children-to-prop**: Lines 195-201 show `TextInputGroupMain` has no children — it's self-closing with only props (`value`, `onChange`, `onClick`, `placeholder`, `autoComplete`). No icon to move.

**Fix 6 — Select transitive behavioral change (Popper appendTo default)**: The default for `appendTo` changed from `'inline'` to `() => document.body`. This means the dropdown will now render in a portal to `document.body` instead of inline. To preserve existing behavior, I should add `appendTo: 'inline'` to the `popperProps`. This is important because the component likely expects inline rendering behavior.

Let me apply the one substantive change — Fix 6:
Let me verify the final file looks correct:
The file looks correct. Let me verify there are no companion test files specifically for this component:

No companion test files exist for this component. The file is complete and correct.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| **Fix 1** | `Button.variant` type changed | **No change needed** | The value `"plain"` is still valid in the new type union. The only change was the *addition* of `'stateful'` — no existing code is affected. |
| **Fix 2** | Select family migration (`onSelect` type, `popperProps` type, `SelectList` requires `SelectOption`) | **No change needed** | (a) `onSelect` callback passes string values which remain compatible with `SelectOptionProps['value']`. (b) `popperProps` value `{ width: 'trigger' }` is valid for `PopperOptions`. (c) `SelectList` already contains `SelectOption` children via `allOptions`. All three incidents are already using the v6 API correctly (`Select`, `SelectList`, `SelectOption` imports already present). |
| **Fix 3** | `Button` icon children-to-prop | **Already applied** | The `<Button>` at line 205 already uses `icon={<TimesIcon />}` as a prop with self-closing syntax. This was applied in a previous pass. |
| **Fix 4** | `MenuToggle` icon children-to-prop | **No change needed** | Line 184: MenuToggle children are `<TextInputGroup>` (not an icon). Line 218: MenuToggle children are text content `{inputValue || ...}` (not an icon). Neither location has icon elements as children. |
| **Fix 5** | `TextInputGroupMain` icon children-to-prop | **No change needed** | `TextInputGroupMain` at line 195 has no children — it only has props (`value`, `onChange`, `onClick`, `placeholder`, `autoComplete`) and is self-closing. No icon to move. |
| **Fix 6** | Select transitive behavioral change (Popper `appendTo` default) | **Applied** | Added `appendTo: 'inline'` to `popperProps` on line 242 to preserve the pre-v6 inline rendering behavior (default changed from `'inline'` to `() => document.body`). |

### Fix 3

Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

### Fix 4
Lines: 184, 218
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-menutoggle]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <MenuToggle> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <MenuToggle> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <MenuToggle variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <MenuToggle> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <MenuToggle><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</MenuToggle>

Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-textinputgroupmain]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <TextInputGroupMain> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

### Fix 6
Line: 4
Rule [sd-test-select-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
Select is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- Select renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for Select may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls
